sglang.title: [VLM] Replace decord with torchcodec for video decoding
sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Replace unmaintained decord with PyTorch-official torchcodec for video decoding.
Why

decord is unmaintained (3+ years), causes segfaults, hangs, and is unpicklable
torchcodec is actively maintained, supports GPU decoding, and was already a dependency (but unused)

What

New VideoDecoderWrap

sglang.title: [Bugfix] Fix load_audio: mono before resample + use torchaudio
sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:

Reorder load_audio() to convert to mono before resampling (reduces computation by ~50% for stereo)

This PR add a fast path for models like MiniMax M2.5 on ROCm by leveraging aiter's biased_grouped_topk kernel when sigmoid scoring with bias correction is used in fused_topk_bias.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Qwen3-Next in_proj_ba weight sharding with TP > 1
vllm.author: AjAnubolu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
MergedColumnParallelLinear split the interleaved GQA weight at the midpoint, scrambling b/a gating values across TP ranks. Use single-shard output_sizes to preserve the layout.
Closes #35504

vllm.title: [Model] Add HyperCLOVAX-SEED-Think-32B vision-language model support
vllm.author: effortprogrammer
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Add support for naver-hyperclovax/HyperCLOVAX-SEED-Think-32B in vLLM with a dedicated V2 implementation, while keeping the existing 3B implementation intact.
Scope

This PR targets Think-32B support.
Omni-specific support is out of scope for this PR.

Changes

Added new V2 model file:

vllm/

vllm.title: [BugFix] Remove incorrect assert in split_decodes_and_prefills
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The assert statement does not consider the query_lens == 0 case.

vllm.title: [Perf] Compute maxsim in worker side, reducing redundant copies, 2.7% E2E throughput improvement
vllm.author: yewentao256
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR moves MaxSim scoring from the API server to workers.
This reduces embedding transfer overhead and improves rerank latency/throughput.
Follow up TODO: batched version in worker side.
CC: @noooop @DarkLight1337
Test
Acc
Covered in unit tests
tests/entrypoints/pooling/score/test_online_

vllm.title: Fix LFM2 MoE test for Transformers v5
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Use correct min_transformers_version
Override the num_hidden_layers so that at least one MoE layer is initialised

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix `RuntimeError: Already borrowed` that degrades VLM serving throughput under concurrent load.
vllm.author: hallerite
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Root cause
BaseRenderer.__init__ passes the same HF tokenizer instance to both the AsyncMicrobatchTokenizer (API-side tokenization) and the multimodal processor (via create_processor). These run on different threads:
Request A (main thread, Step 3 — MM processing):
  process_for_engine → _process_mu

vllm.title: Fix: Re-Enable EP for trtllm MoE FP8 backend
vllm.author: amirkl94
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Remove check to verify EP is not enabled when using trtllm MoE backend for FP8, as it works.
Test Plan
Verify lm_eval on https://huggingface.co/nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B-FP8 with EP enabled on 4xB200.
Test Result
Flashinfer 0.6.4 installed, so fp8 default to trtllm MoE backend
MO
